semantic.role: To define the architecture and usage guidelines for the ArchSpine mirror system, ensuring consistent content synchronization across platforms.

English.purpose: This document explains the purpose of ArchSpine as a content mirror system, detailing how it synchronizes documentation repositories.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for system administrators and developers who manage mirrored content using ArchSpine. It assumes familiarity with Git-based workflows and basic DevOps concepts.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine mirrors content bidirectionally between source and target repositories
Configuration is handled via a YAML file for flexibility
Conflict resolution follows a predefined priority order

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档介绍了ArchSpine作为内容镜像系统的用途，详细说明了它如何同步文档仓库。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向使用ArchSpine管理镜像内容的系统管理员和开发人员。读者应熟悉基于Git的工作流程和基本的DevOps概念。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine在源仓库和目标仓库之间双向镜像内容
通过YAML配置文件实现灵活配置
冲突解决遵循预定义的优先级顺序
